title: Bid Management Executive (Environmental Services)
description:
Key Responsibilities

1. Tender & Bid Management

  • Manage the full bid lifecycle from tender invitation to submission, including clarifications and post-submission follow-ups.
  • Review tender documents, specifications, and contractual requirements to identify scope, risks, and compliance items.
  • Prepare and manage tender schedules, ensuring all deadlines are met.

2. Proposal & Documentation Preparation

  • Coordinate and compile technical, commercial, and administrative documents for tenders.
  • Draft and structure proposal narratives, method statements, manpower deployment plans, and compliance matrices.
  • Ensure all submissions meet client formats, authority requirements, and internal approval protocols.

3. Cross-Functional Coordination

  • Liaise with Operations, EHS, Procurement, Finance, and Sales to gather inputs such as:
  • Manpower and deployment plans
  • Costing and pricing breakdowns
  • Safety, quality, and operational methodologies, etc
  • Follow up with internal stakeholders to ensure timely and accurate inputs.

4. Pricing & Costing Support

  • Assist in preparing cost models and pricing summaries based on operational requirements.
  • Coordinate with Finance and Operations to ensure pricing accuracy and commercial viability.
  • Support management in scenario analysis and pricing adjustments during tender negotiations.

5. Compliance & Risk Control

  • Ensure all bids comply with tender conditions, contractual clauses, and statutory requirements.
  • Highlight contractual, operational, or commercial risks for management review.
  • Maintain proper version control and audit trails for all tender documents.

6. Systems & Records Management

  • Maintain organized records of submitted tenders, quotations, and supporting documents.

7. Post-Tender & Award Support

  • Assist with tender interviews, presentations, and clarifications.
  • Support handover to Operations upon award, ensuring scope, pricing, and obligations are clearly communicated.
  • Participate in post-tender reviews to improve future bid quality and success rates.

Requirements & Qualifications

  • Diploma in Business, Engineering, Facilities Management, or related discipline.
  • 1–3 years of experience in bid management, tender coordination, or sales support.
  • Strong attention to detail and ability to manage multiple tenders concurrently.
  • Proficient in Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint); familiarity with tender portals and internal management systems is an advantage.
  • Good communication and stakeholder management skills.
  • Ability to work under tight deadlines in a structured and methodical manner.

postedCompany.description:
Weishen Industrial Pte Ltd (WIS) has established Estate Management and Industrial Services companies in Singapore and other Asian countries through commercial partnerships. From the early 80s, WIS has been serving customers especially in oil refinery, petrochemicals plant, industrial facilities, commercial buildings and residential estates with outstanding performance and reputation. Our clients include major commercial, residential and industrial facilities in the private and public sectors. We are a reputable service provider with high degree of customer satisfaction.

 

The main objective of WIS is to provide complete solution in environmental management and industrial waste management in a highly efficient and professional manner to all customers, regardless of size. We strongly believe in providing intelligent and efficient solutions with professional service supported by quality products and materials, employing the latest technology in order to achieve a comfortable working and living environment.

 

Services cover area in: Tank cleaning for oil refinery and petrochemicals plants, floor de-oiling and waste management service, cleaning of factory, airport, highways, shopping mall, F&B establishment, internal and external of commercial building, private and public residential estates, parks and gardens, airport terminals and MRT stations, facilities, pest control, odor removal and sterilization of hotel, hospital, etc.
postedCompany.name: WEISHEN INDUSTRIAL SERVICES PTE LTD
